Patch Set 3:

It looks like there was a cleanup error in replay-single.sh at the end of the test.  Possibly an error in stopping the ptlrpcd threads?

Patch Set 3:

> Patch Set 3:
> It looks like there was a cleanup error in replay-single.sh at the end of the test. Possibly an error in stopping the ptlrpcd threads?

I do not think so. The failure is:

17:19:46:== replay-single replay-single.sh test complete, duration 2701 sec == 17:19:45 (1314490785)
17:22:17:rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d88/f-3663': Input/output error
17:22:18:rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d88/f-3699': Input/output error
17:22:18:rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d88/f-3680': Input/output error

17:22:18:rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d88/f-3685': Input/output error
17:22:18:rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d88/f-3694': Input/output error
17:22:18:rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d88/f-3687': Input/output error
17:22:18:rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d88/f-3676': Input/output error
17:22:18:rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d88/f-3656': Input/output error
17:22:18:rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d88/f-3659': Input/output error
17:22:18:rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d88/f-3689': Input/output error
17:22:18:rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d88/f-3653': Input/output error
17:22:19:rm: cannot remove `/mnt/lustre/d0.replay-single/d88/f-3693': Input/output error
17:22:20:replay-single returned 0


The failure occurred when cleanup before umount, so ptlrpcd still running at that time.

parents.subject: LU-822 osd: multiple Object Index files

commit.subject: LU-925 agl: async glimpse lock process in CLIO stack
commit.message:
LU-925 agl: async glimpse lock process in CLIO stack

Adjust CLIO lock state machine for supporting:
1. unuse lock in non-hold state.
2. re-enqueue non-granted glimpse lock.

Signed-off-by: Fan Yong <yong.fan@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I9de8939a398d7b4c7062e6c5859bca06deddd089
